theme: Light Theme Priority (with Dark Mode Support)

rules: No pure black or pure white; tint neutrals slightly with navy.
Primary CTA buttons use Navy (#0F2040) on light mode, Gold (#F2A900) on dark mode.
Never use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans.
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

layout_spacing.system: Tailwind standard scale, prioritize generous padding (p-6, p-8, p-12) for calm UI.
layout_spacing.student_view: Chromebook-optimized (1366x768). Focused single column or two-column (image on left, options on right). Question images max-h-[60vh] to avoid scrolling.
layout_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid (gap-4/gap-6, strict data density). Modular drag-and-drop sections.
layout_spacing.wizards: Step-by-step progressive disclosure, centered max-w-3xl containers.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat solid background, 1px border-border, no shadow by default. Hover lift (-translate-y-1) + shadow-lg for interactive cards.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Subtle roundness (rounded-md). High contrast text. Student test buttons must be extra large (p-6) with explicit A/B/C/D markers.
surfaces_and_components.headers: Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-white/70 or bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-border/40) if sticky.
surfaces_and_components.forms: Use Shadcn UI customized with brand border radius and colors.
surfaces_and_components.charts: Recharts. Use brand colors (Navy, Gold) and complementary cool tones (Teal/Blue) for data series. Avoid red/green unless indicating negative/positive.
surfaces_and_components.tables: Dense rows for admin data, subtle hover state (bg-slate-50).

rules: Hover states: transition-transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease.

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='student-submit-test').

instructions_to_main_agent: Set up Tailwind CSS with 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Outfit' fonts.
Implement student assessment flow for 1366x768 screens: ultra-simple login, clear course/teacher selection, and distraction-free test interface with large tap targets.
Build district/campus admin dashboards using Recharts with the HPA brand color palette.
Create the OneRoster ZIP import and Test Answer Key wizards using multistep forms and Shadcn UI components.
Implement role-based layouts (Student Test Layout vs Admin Dashboard Layout).
Ensure ALL buttons, inputs, and clickable elements have kebab-case data-testid attributes.
